_template_description: Parallel narratives across two fandoms — heroes and villains, light and dark, past and present.

concept.one_sentence: Two opposing perspectives, cut in alternating sections until they collide.

acts.name: side A
acts.notes: First fandom's world. Establish the perspective.

acts.name: side B
acts.notes: Second fandom's world. Mirror the beats from act 1.

acts.name: interweave
acts.notes: Rapid intercutting between the two sides. Same emotion different context.

acts.name: collision
acts.notes: Both arcs resolve on the same drop. The two are actually one story.
